title: 3D Elytra
description: This resource pack adds a 3D Model for the Elytra being held or just being in your inventory.
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae4ac974601860a06bfae2b64a1798fc5d796e1.png)



##  Take to the skies with style!

This is a fully custom Elytra model designed for Minecraft, created in Blockbench. It features a clean, detailed design with optimized textures for smooth performance. Perfect for players who want their wings to stand out in both first-person and third-person views.

# Features:

Custom 3D Elytra model with original texture

Fully compatible with inventory and world display

Optimized for performance and aesthetics

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer

# Notes:

Designed for Minecraft version 1.21.6+.

It's NOT compatible 1.21.5-1.18.I will make it compatible soon.
